generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for precise feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox to reduce backlash and positional uncertainty"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time series position data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoderTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series position data from motor encoder streamed via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink, SysMLStateMachines, MontiArcAutomaton, CppCode, JavaCode
]

instance SecondaryEncoderTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series position data from secondary encoder streamed via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink, SysMLStateMachines, MontiArcAutomaton, CppCode, JavaCode
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology for Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object-Oriented Systems Engineering Methodology for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Systematic Product Engineering and Systems Engineering methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System Modeling and Analysis for Digital Twins methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Analysis & Design Language for embedded systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture description language for component-based systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SysMLIBDs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SysMLStateMachines : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML state machines for system behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for dynamic system simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance CppCode : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming for general-purpose code implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance JavaCode : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming for general-purpose code implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of robot subsystems for operational status"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance of mechanical and electrical subsystems based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational status and potential anomalies in real-time"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted failures and maintenance needs for mechanical components"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Drives the gear transmission with high precision for manufacturing tasks"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Transmits motion from motor to cycloidal gear mechanism"
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Reduces backlash and provides precise motion control"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DSLController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller accepting position, speed, or acceleration inputs for actuation"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 used for precision manufacturing tasks"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGear, SiemensSINUMERIK840DSLController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML Internal Block Diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBDs, ACME, AADL, MontiArc
]

instance PhysicsBasedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based analytical model for mechanical subsystems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RFLP, MathWorksSimulink
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomaton
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using SysML state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStateMachines
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Time-series sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol, and live measurements are integrated with structural and behavioral models for operational data."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture integrates SysML for structural modeling, Simulink for dynamic simulations, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized data exchange, following the Digital Shadow Reference Model to coordinate components and manage resources across the Digital Twin ecosystem."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for streaming time series sensor data from physical sensors to the digital system."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Sensor data is streamed via MQTT protocol, and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are implemented for standardized asset representation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML, AADL, ACME, and MontiArc for architecture description. MBSE methodologies integrate these languages across multiple abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer), ensuring interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders and tools such as Simulink, C++, and Java."
]
